headline: Investing in Mondelez (MDLZ)? Don't Miss Assessing Its International Revenue Trends
summary: Examine the evolution of Mondelez's (MDLZ) overseas revenue trends and their effects on Wall Street's forecasts and the stock's prospects.

headline: The LUNA Brand Debuts New "Easy to Love" Campaign Starring Jessica Alba as Brand Fan Turned Ambassador
summary: LUNA Bar, the gluten-free snack bar brand dedicated to helping consumers elevate the moment, today launched its new "Easy to Love" creative campaign, starring longtime brand fan Jessica Alba as its inaugural ambassador.
